scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-core build && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-ui build && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-server build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-server typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-core test && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-ui test && pnpm --filter @ratel-ai/mcp-server test
